builder.buildCommand: TH_UPLOAD_RUNNER=remote TH_UPLOAD_PROVIDER=filecoin_onchain_cloud TH_UPLOAD_REMOTE_ENDPOINT_URL=/storage/upload TH_UPLOAD_REMOTE_STATUS_URL=/storage/uploads/status pnpm --dir "$TOKENHOST_BUILDER_DIR" th build "$FOC_PLATFORM_DIR/apps/tokenhost-foc-platform/schema.json" --chain filecoin_calibration --tx-mode sponsored --relay-base-url /__tokenhost/relay --out /tmp/foc-platform-tokenhost-demo

externalBuilderIssues.title: Add app.focPlatform schema and manifest extension
externalBuilderIssues.impact: FOC metadata lives in this wrapper config until the builder emits app.focPlatform manifest extensions.

externalBuilderIssues.title: Support FOC Platform registry lifecycle generation or wrapper mode
externalBuilderIssues.impact: Generated CRUD must wrap the hand-written registry; it is not production-equivalent to section 6.7.

externalBuilderIssues.title: Add FOC Platform receipt-aware upload runner path
externalBuilderIssues.impact: Upload runner output remains prototype/wrapper metadata until it can produce section 6.7-compatible receipts.

boundaries: Token Host generated CRUD is a UI/upload scaffold only.
FocPlatformRegistry remains authoritative for lifecycle, receipts, usage, relayer accountability, and coordinator controls.
No generated artifact may include coordinator private keys or platform root secrets.
Real Filecoin Calibration and Synapse execution remain gated by Phase 0 credentials/evidence.
